name: Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream Mixture: In an electric mixer, prepare the cream mixture by whipping sugar and egg yolks on high speed until pale yellow and thick.
2. With the mixer on medium speed, add cream cheese and whip until smooth. Add mascarpone and Marsala wine. Mix until incorporated. Fold in whipped cream. Refrigerate.
3. Espresso Mixture: To prepare the espresso mixture, combine espresso, additional Marsala wine, dark rum, and sugar.
4. To assemble, dip ladyfingers in the espresso mixture. Place one layer of dipped ladyfingers on the bottom of a serving platter. Top with one layer of cream mixture.
5. Add another layer of dipped ladyfingers, topped with a second layer of cream mixture. Sift cocoa over top. Sprinkle with grated chocolate.
Suggested Wine: Late Harvest Sauvignon Blanc
